case_title: FIRST TECHNOLOGY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. JEREMY TRAYLOR ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-03-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-02-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
